title: DiagnosticsProbeRecord
description: A single timed command or probe execution captured inside a DiagnosticsBundle manifest.

name.description: Stable probe name within the diagnostics bundle.

tier.description: Capture tier for this probe, where 0 is the lowest-risk baseline and higher numbers are progressively more invasive.

timeoutSeconds.description: Maximum allowed runtime budget for this probe, in seconds.

command.description: Exact shell command or equivalent invocation executed for this probe.

exitCode.description: Process exit code returned by the probe.

timeoutHit.description: Whether the probe exceeded its timeout budget and was terminated or otherwise classified as timed out.

durationMs.description: Observed wall-clock runtime for this probe, in milliseconds.

path.description: Relative path of the captured stdout artifact within the bundle.

bytes.description: Byte size of the stdout artifact.

sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the stdout artifact.

stdout.description: Integrity and location metadata for the probe's stdout artifact.

path.description: Relative path of the captured stderr artifact within the bundle.

bytes.description: Byte size of the stderr artifact.

sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the stderr artifact.

stderr.description: Integrity and location metadata for the probe's stderr artifact.

rssMaxKb.description: Maximum resident set size recorded for the probe in kibibytes, if the runtime collector was able to observe it.
